creator: kiwi@oav.net
text:
Hello,

I Agree with this patch :)

You can commit it without any problems

/Xavier
Le 13 avr. 09 à 07:00, Edwin Groothuis a écrit :

> Maintainer of www/mod_vhs,
>
> Please note that PR ports/133687 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133687
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
